Head of Engineering - AI Platform
job_description:
Head of Engineering

Do you thrive on building teams, systems, and products that make a measurable difference?

We're looking for a Head of Engineering to lead the technical evolution of our intelligent building platform that empowers the real estate industry to achieve their sustainability and energy efficiency goals through agentic AI.

As an early technical leader in a well-funded, fast-moving startup, you'll shape the platform's architecture, build and mentor a high-performing engineering team, and turn cutting-edge ideas into production-ready systems.

You'll have the opportunity to:
• Define and deliver the technical roadmap for an AI-driven building platform that learns, predicts, and optimises energy performance in real time.
• Build, coach, and scale a multidisciplinary team across software, data, and AI engineering.
• Shape architectural and product decisions in close collaboration with Head of Product and engineering leads.
• See your work come to life across pilot buildings and portfolios from code to real-world impact on energy and emissions.

This is a unique opportunity to build a platform and a team from the ground up in a domain where technology directly contributes to a more sustainable future. If you're a hands-on engineering leader who values clarity, craft, and purpose, while aligning with business goals, we'd love to hear from you.

What you'll do:
• Lead the design, architecture, and delivery of cMatter's agentic AI platform from data ingestion and backend services to AI orchestration and frontend integration.
• Collaborate closely with Product, Data Ingestion and Data Science to translate product vision and customer problems into scalable technical solutions.
• Build and mentor a multidisciplinary engineering team across software, data, and AI disciplines, fostering a culture of technical excellence, ownership, and learning.
• Define engineering standards, review critical designs and code, and ensure the reliability, scalability, and cost-efficiency of all systems.
• Drive adoption of best practices in CI/CD, observability, automated testing, and secure-by-design development.
• Partner with leadership on roadmap planning, resource allocation, and technical hiring strategy.
• Play a key role in transforming early-stage pilots into a production-grade SaaS platform deployed across multiple building portfolios.

What you'll need:

Must have:
• 10+ years of software engineering experience, with at least 3–5 years in a technical leadership or management role.
• Proven experience architecting and scaling and delivering cloud-based SaaS platforms.
• Strong background in running SaaS applications and supporting customers in production.
• Hands-on familiarity with modern data infrastructure and cloud environments (AWS preferred).
• Understanding of applied AI/ML pipelines or agentic system architectures.
• Track record of building and leading high-performing, cross-functional teams.
• Strong sense of accountability, focus on customer success and a high bar for quality.
• Ability to bring clarity and purpose to ambiguous situations.
• Excellent communication and collaboration skills, able to bridge business and technical goals.
• Fluency in English, verbal and written.

Core Technical skills:
• System architecture, distributed systems design, and API development.
• Data platform design — ingestion, aggregation, and analytics (streaming and batch).
• Practical understanding of AI/ML integration in production systems, including model deployment and monitoring.
• CI/CD pipelines, DevOps tooling, and infrastructure as code (GitLab CI, Terraform, Docker, etc.).
• Experience with observability stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, or similar) and cost management for cloud workloads.
• Strong grounding in software design principles, testing strategies, and code quality enforcement.

Nice to have:
• Experience with energy management, building systems (BMS/HVAC), or IoT data.
• Previous work with GenAI and agentic frameworks.
• Exposure to modern frontend or chat-style UX patterns for AI interfaces.
• Hands-on experience with IoT, data streaming and ETL flows and performance optimisation.
• Understanding of event-driven architectures and edge-cloud coordination.
• Experience preparing for or operating in scale-up environments.

Why join us?

This isn't just another engineering leadership role; it's a chance to shape the future of intelligent buildings and define the technical direction of a company on the verge of scale. You'll join a mission-driven, well-funded startup where technology and purpose meet - transforming how buildings think, predict, and act.

Here's what makes this role stand out:
• Be the technical cornerstone: Your architectural vision and leadership will directly shape our core platform and influence product strategy at the highest level.
• Build with impact: See your work come to life across real buildings and portfolios, improving energy efficiency, reducing emissions, and driving sustainability outcomes.
• Lead collaboratively: Work in an environment that values transparency, creativity, and genuine teamwork across engineering, AI, and product disciplines.
• Thrive in a global innovation hub: Join us in the UAE - a vibrant, forward-looking ecosystem that brings together diverse talent and ideas from around the world.
• Grow with us: Competitive compensation, health insurance, visa sponsorship, generous annual leave, and a discretionary bonus as part of our long-term growth plan.

About Us:
cMatter is the technology arm of Reech Corporations Group (RCG), focused on AI innovation and analytics in the areas of energy efficiency and carbon reduction. RCG is a well-established investment powerhouse that identifies market inefficiencies and develops technology-led solutions to redefine entire industries for growth.

job_description: Job Title : Security Solutions ArchitectDuration : 12 Months Contract(Extendable)Location : Dubai, UAEArabic Speaker is a must.About the roleAdecco is hiring a Security Solutions Architect for our client, a prominentplayer in the [IT Services and Consulting ] sector, based in [Dubai, UAE]. job_description: OverviewAs a Senior Technical Architect at Inception, you will play a pivotal role inshaping the overarching architecture strategy for our AI-driven initiatives. Youwill work across teams to align business objectives with technology strategies,drive technical-wide architectural decisions, and ensure our systems arescalable, secure, and aligned with best practices. Your expertise will beinstrumental in driving innovation and ensuring the successful delivery oftransformative AI solutions.The opportunityInception is the UAE’s national-scale enabler in AI Research and Development.Partnering with Microsoft's AI SaaS, we offer domain-specific Agentic AIOrchestrator platform utilizing reasoning agents for precise and cost-effectiveservices. Our focus includes AI incubation, IP creation, applied AI R&D, and AIinvestment products. By creating models tailored to specific domains andlanguages, we ensure superior accuracy and efficiency. Collaborating with topuniversities and industry giants to drive significant advancements in AItechnology within the region.Responsibilities * Develop and maintain the technical architecture framework to support business objectives and technology strategies. * Lead the evaluation, selection, and integration of new technologies and frameworks across the organization. * Provide strategic guidance and oversight for large-scale AI and technology initiatives. * Partner with stakeholders to define and align architectural standards, principles, and practices. * Ensure compliance with security, regulatory, and performance requirements across technical systems. * Design and oversee the implementation of scalable, secure, and high-performance AI solutions. * Mentor and guide architects and technical teams in best practices and innovative solutions. * Monitor technology trends and advocate for the adoption of emerging technologies where applicable. Required Tech Stack * Technical Architecture: Deep experience with frameworks such as TOGAF, Zachman, or similar. * Programming and Development: Proficiency in languages like Python, Java, and JavaScript, with a focus on technical-level solutions. * AI and Machine Learning: Familiarity with frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and technical AI platforms. * Cloud Platforms: Expertise in AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP). * Data Management: Advanced knowledge of SQL, NoSQL databases, and big data solutions (e.g., Hadoop, Spark). * Microservices and Integration: Expertise in microservices architecture, RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and service mesh technologies. * Security and Compliance: In-depth understanding of technical security standards and compliance requirements. * DevOps and Automation: Experience with CI/CD pipelines, containerization tools like Docker and Kubernetes, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools like Terraform. QualificationsSkills and attributes for success * Proven ability to lead technical-scale architectural transformations. * Strong analytical skills and the ability to translate complex business requirements into scalable and efficient architectures. * Exceptional leadership and communication skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels. * A proactive, innovative mindset with a bias for action and continuous learning. To qualify for the role you must have * Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field. * Extensive experience in technical architecture and technology leadership. * Demonstrated success in delivering large-scale, AI-driven solutions. * Deep understanding of architectural principles, system design, and technology strategy. What We Look ForIf you are a performance-driven, inquisitive mind with the agility to adapt toambiguity, you will fit right in. You should be eager to explore opportunitiesto build meaningful collaborations with stakeholders and aspire to create uniquecustomer-centric solutions. Bias for action and a passion to conquer newfrontiers in the AI space is at the heart of the Inception community.What Working At Inception OffersCulture: An open, diverse and inclusive environment with a global vision thatencourages personal growth and focuses on ground-breaking, industry-firstinnovations.Career: Outstanding learning, development & growth opportunities via structuredtraining programs and innovative, high-tech projects.Work-Life: A hybrid work policy to strike the perfect balance between office andhome.Rewards: A competitive remuneration package with a host of perks includinghealthcare, education support, leave benefits and more.If you can confidently demonstrate that you meet the criteria above, pleasecontact us as soon as possible.Show more Show less

The role combines technicalleadership,strategic consulting, and solution design, ensuring our clientsderive measurable business value from their data investments. You will act as atrusted advisor to clients, guide technical teams, and architect best-in-classsolutions that leverage the latest in cloud, data, and AI innovation.ResponsibilitiesSolution Design & Architecture : * Design end-to-end data and AI architectures across ingestion, transformation, storage, analytics, and ML layers. * Build scalable, cloud-native ecosystems using Azure, Snowflake, and open-source frameworks (Spark, Airflow, Kafka). * Define architecture blueprints, data models, and governance-aligned integration patterns. * Develop AI/ML platforms with MLOps, monitoring, and responsible AI principles. Client Consulting & Engagement * Translate business needs into scalable data-driven solutions. * Support pre-sales, RFPs, and executive-level presentations. * Advise on data strategy, architecture roadmaps, and AI adoption frameworks. Delivery & Governance * Ensure architectural integrity, scalability, and compliance with data privacy standards. * Define best practices, reusable assets, and mentoring frameworks for internal teams. Key Skills Requirements * Proficient in end-to-end AI architecture (data prep to deployment) with MLOps, Spark, Kafka, Airflow, Hadoop, dbt, and Delta Lake. * Expertise in LLMs, GenAI models, and AI agents using Azure OpenAI, LangChain, and Semantic Kernel. * Experience with RAG pipelines, vector databases, and governance frameworks. * Hands-on expertise in Azure Synapse, Data Factory, Databricks, Purview, and Machine Learning. * Experience with Azure OpenAI, Cognitive Services, and Microsoft Fabric. * Efficiency in data lakehouse design, Snowpark, Streamlit, optimization for large-scale analytics, automation using dbt, Airflow, and Terraform. * Strong programming skills in Python, SQL, and Scala, and experience with API/microservice-based data integration. * Expertise in CI/CD with Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Docker, and Kubernetes. * Proven client-facing and advisory consulting experience with strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills. * Bachelors/Masters in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or other related fields. * Minimum 8 years of total experience, with at least 2 years in Data/AI solution architecture roles. * Preferred certifications : Azure Solutions Architect Expert, Data Engineer Associate, SnowPro Core, Advanced Architect, and TOGAF (optional).
